definition:
δακρύω 
 [in LXX for בָּכָה, etc. ;] 
to weep, shed tears: Jhn.11:35.†
 SYN.: κλαίω, of audible weeping, to cry; ὀδύρομαι, of grief expressed verbally, to lament; θρηνέω, of formal lamentation, to sing a dirge; ἀλαλάζω, to wail in Oriental fashion; στενάζω, of grief expressed by inarticulate sounds, to groan. (AS)
